columns.text:
1. DEFINITIONS: 'Provider' refers to Global Tech, and 'Client' refers to the signatory. 

2. SERVICES: The Provider shall deliver software maintenance services as described in the service level agreement. 

3. PAYMENT: All invoices are payable within 30 days of receipt. Late payments may incur a fee of 1.5% per month. 

[Imagine 5 more pages of legal text here... Flow mode will handle the page breaks automatically.]
